posts.caption:
Meta just rolled out Content Seal, an invisible watermarking system designed to flag AI-generated content across its platforms. The move follows direct pressure from Meta's Oversight Board, which had been pushing the company to build detection tools. The watermarks are embedded at creation — silent, invisible, and meant to survive sharing.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio

#AIwatermarking #MetaAI #ContentAuthenticity #AIdetection #AIpolicy

story.title: Meta's Content Seal watermarking tool targets AI-generated content detection
story.dek: Meta deployed invisible watermarking technology to flag AI-generated content on its platforms, following pressure from its Oversight Board to implement detection tools.

posts.caption:
Autodesk just previewed its SIGGRAPH 2026 roadmap — and it's a hard pivot toward generative 3D. AI animation tools are coming to Maya and 3ds Max, alongside Gaussian Splat support and deeper Flow integration across the suite. The throughline: less manual keyframing, more AI-assisted production at every stage.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#Autodesk #Maya #3dsMax #AIAnimation #GaussianSplatting #3DProduction

story.title: Autodesk SIGGRAPH 2026: AI animation, Gaussian Splats in 3ds Max and Maya
story.dek: Autodesk announced AI animation tools and Flow integration across 3ds Max and Maya, signaling shift toward generative workflows in 3D production.

posts.caption:
AMD just made a massive bet on Anthropic — up to $5 billion and 2 gigawatts of AI GPU capacity committed to powering Anthropic's large-scale model deployment. The deal centers on AMD's MI450 GPUs, signaling a serious infrastructure play as the compute race for frontier AI intensifies. This is what the hardware layer of the AI arms race actually looks like.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AMD #Anthropic #AIInfrastructure #GPUs #AINews #GenerativeAI

story.title: AMD invests $5B in Anthropic, deploys MI450 GPUs at scale
story.dek: AMD commits up to $5 billion and 2 gigawatts of AI GPU capacity to Anthropic, expanding compute infrastructure for large-scale model deployment.

posts.caption:
OpenAI just launched Presence, an enterprise platform for deploying AI agents across both voice and chat channels. It's built for businesses running customer-facing and internal workflows — think call handling, support routing, and employee tools, all under one trusted system. This is OpenAI moving deeper into the enterprise infrastructure layer.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio

#OpenAI #AIAgents #EnterpriseAI #VoiceAI #AITools #Presence

story.title: OpenAI launches Presence enterprise voice and chat agent platform
story.dek: New AI agent platform designed for enterprises to deploy trusted voice and chat systems for customer and internal workflows.

posts.caption:
Synthesia just launched AI Roleplay Sessions — an enterprise training platform where employees practice real workplace conversations with AI avatars. The avatars score your performance and spit out analytics so companies can actually measure whether training is landing.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AITraining #Synthesia #EnterpriseAI #AIAvatars #WorkplaceLearning

story.title: Synthesia launches AI roleplay platform for enterprise training simulations
story.dek: Synthesia released AI Roleplay Sessions, letting employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that score performance and provide analytics for training measurement.

posts.caption:
AI orchestral tools that once cost a film budget are now free, available at 2 a.m., on any laptop. Bedroom producers can conjure strings, brass, and full arrangements overnight — no session musicians, no studio fees. But the dek is honest: someone else is paying that price, and the story doesn't look away from it.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#MusicProduction #AIMusic #BedroomProducer #AITools #MusicTech #CreatorEconomy

story.title: Bedroom Producers Just Got a Session Orchestra for Free. Now What?
story.dek: The tools that used to cost a film budget are now free at 2 a.m. on a laptop. That's genuinely exciting, and it comes with a real price someone else is paying.
